tasks.name: Shared Reference Epoch Constant
tasks.description: Create time_utils.py with REFERENCE_EPOCH, REFERENCE_EPOCH_TS, sim_time_to_datetime(), and sim_time_to_iso(). Remove _REFERENCE_EPOCH_TS from mqtt_publisher.py, opcua_server.py, health/server.py. Remove _sim_time_to_iso() from mqtt_publisher.py and _sim_time_to_datetime() from opcua_server.py. Update all callers to use shared functions. Update ground_truth.py _format_time() to delegate to sim_time_to_iso(). Test: new module with epoch value, conversion, and format tests.

tasks.name: _format_time() Performance Fix
tasks.description: Verify that _format_time() delegates to time_utils.sim_time_to_iso() after 6d.1 (no per-call datetime creation). If 6d.1 already handled it, just verify and mark done. If not, replace the per-call datetime(2026,1,1) with the shared constant.

tasks.name: Configurable Health Server Port
tasks.description: Add health_port field to SimulationConfig (default 8080, validator 0-65535). Add SIM_HEALTH_PORT env override. Update cli.py _run_realtime() to use config.simulation.health_port instead of hardcoded 8080. Test: default 8080, custom port, invalid port raises.

tasks.name: Server Task Verification After Startup
tasks.description: After each asyncio.create_task(srv.start()) + sleep(0.05), check task.done() and raise RuntimeError if the task failed. Extract a _start_server() helper to avoid repetition. Apply to health server, Modbus servers, OPC-UA servers, and MQTT publishers. Test: mock server that fails start → RuntimeError propagated.

tasks.name: Narrow Exception Suppression During Shutdown
tasks.description: Change contextlib.suppress(Exception) to contextlib.suppress(asyncio.CancelledError, OSError, ConnectionError) in the server shutdown loop. Unexpected exceptions (RuntimeError, TypeError, etc.) should propagate. Test: CancelledError/OSError suppressed, RuntimeError propagates.

tasks.name: Dead Config Cleanup (sparkplug_b, retain)
tasks.description: Remove sparkplug_b and retain fields from MqttProtocolConfig. Remove these keys from both YAML config files if present. Grep for any references and remove. The per-topic _retain_for_topic() and TopicEntry.retain are separate and must be preserved. Test: config loads without these fields, MQTT publisher still works.

tasks.name: Generator Tests: Coder
tasks.description: Create dedicated test file for CoderGenerator (11 signals, state machine, counter, depletion, random walk). Tests: off state (zeros), printing state (active signals), prints counter increments, ink depletion, viscosity mean reversion, determinism (same seed = same output), signal count (11).

tasks.name: Generator Tests: Energy
tasks.description: Create dedicated test file for EnergyGenerator (2 signals: line_power, cumulative_kwh). Tests: power correlates with press speed, cumulative increases during Running, low power when Idle, determinism, signal count (2).

tasks.name: Generator Tests: Laminator
tasks.description: Create dedicated test file for LaminatorGenerator (5 signals: nip_temp, nip_pressure, tunnel_temp, web_speed, adhesive_weight). Tests: web_speed tracks press, nip_temp tracks setpoint, adhesive depletes, off state zeros, determinism, signal count (5).

tasks.name: Generator Tests: Slitter
tasks.description: Create dedicated test file for SlitterGenerator (3 signals: speed, web_tension, reel_count). Tests: speed follows press with lag, tension correlates with speed, reel count increments, off state zeros, determinism, signal count (3).

tasks.name: Generator Tests: Vibration
tasks.description: Create dedicated test file for VibrationGenerator (3 signals: main_drive_x/y/z with Cholesky correlation). Tests: non-zero when Running, near-zero when stopped, axes correlated (sample correlations > 0), Cholesky matrix matches PRD, determinism, signal count (3).

tasks.name: CI Matrix: Python 3.13 + Integration Tests
tasks.description: Add Python 3.13 to unit test matrix. Expand integration test job to run all tests/integration/ files except test_mqtt_integration.py (needs broker) and slow-marked tests. Add cache-dependency-path for pip caching. Keep lint/typecheck on 3.12 only.

tasks.name: Validate All Fixes — Full Suite
tasks.description: Run ruff + mypy + pytest full suite. Run batch sim with both profiles (packaging + F&B). Verify no regressions. Fix any failures.
